headings: IV. Insurance Policy Deductibles and Self-Insured Retentions.
text:
- a. Definitions.
- i. For  purposes  of  this  Section,  the  term  'Involved  Party'  shall  mean  any Contractor or subcontractor, whether enrolled or excluded from the OCIP, out of whose portion(s) of the Work the occurrence, offense, loss, claim, or damage arises.
